errors.text: A site characterisation report for an underground tunnel magazine identified limestone with density 2.65 g/cm³ and P-wave velocity 6,000 m/s. Table 104 specifies limestone density 2.5–2.8 g/cm³ and P-wave 5,900–6,100 m/s. All values fall within the tabulated ranges; the classification is consistent.
errors.reasoning: The provided context does not include a "Table 104" with limestone density and P-wave velocity ranges. The only relevant table (Table a) on p.104 lists limestone density as 2.5–2.8 g/cm³ and P-wave velocity as 5900–6100 m/s. The item's values (2.65 g/cm³ and 6,000 m/s) fall within these ranges, but since the cited "Table 104" does not exist in the context, the classification cannot be verified against the provided standard.

errors.text: A limestone formation at a tunnel magazine site measured density 2.7 g/cm³ and S-wave velocity 2,900 m/s. Table 104 specifies limestone density 2.5–2.8 g/cm³ and S-wave 2,800–3,000 m/s. Both values are within range; classification is confirmed.
errors.reasoning: The provided context does not include a table named "Table 104" or any table specifying limestone density 2.5–2.8 g/cm³ and S-wave velocity 2,800–3,000 m/s. The only relevant table (p.104) lists different values for limestone (Density: 2.5-2.8; S-wave Velocity: 2800-3000) but does not match the item's stated values.
